name: KFC Coleslaw
recipeIngredient: Tabasco Sauce (2 drops or to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice cabbage paper thin and toss lightly with sugar.
2. Shred carrots and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Drench both mixtures in milk, then cover and refrigerate for about 15 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, combine mayonnaise, buttermilk, celery seed, Tabasco sauce, and dried minced onion until well mixed.
5. Mix the chilled cabbage mixture with the dressing.
6. Refrigerate the coleslaw again for at least an hour before serving.
7. Drain some of the dressing before serving to enjoy it separately on the table.
8. Note: This coleslaw is best served fresh and keeps only for 24 hours.
